column3: Expected Goals p90 created by a team while playing 11 versus 11.
Expected Goals p90 allowed by a team while playing 11 versus 11.
The difference between xG (created) and xGA (allowed) while playing 11 versus 11.
The percentage of time a team controls the ball during the match.
The percentage of ball possession based on touches completed in the final thirds of the field.
The measure of scoring opportunities created via passes and crosses. Calculated based on start/end locations of non-shot events.
The measure of scoring opportunities allowed via passes and crosses. Calculated based on start/end locations of non-shot events.
The difference between xT (created) and xTA (allowed). Calculated based on start/end locations of non-shot events.
The average distance (in meters) from a team's goal to where its defensive actions occur.
The average distance (in meters) from the opponent's goal to where their defensive actions occur.
The percentage of successfully completed passes outside the final third of the field.
The percentage of successfully completed passes by the opponent outside the final third of the field.
Unsuccessful passes, lost dribbles, or bad touches near a team's own goal. Higher values indicate low press resistance.
The opponent's unsuccessful passes, lost dribbles, or bad touches near their goal. Higher values indicate more effective pressing.
